posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Meet our impressive speakers

Meet our two phenomenal speakers joining us at our upcoming MEGA community event, Driving Productivity: from me to we.

Prepare to be inspired by the incredible Katy Milkman.

Katy Milkman Preferred Headshot 20211920×2877 366 KB

As a celebrated author, podcast host, and award-winning behavioral economist, Katy knows a thing or two about making change stick. She’ll draw on the latest research to give us strategies and tips for achieving long-term success and fostering a culture of continuous improvement within our teams.

Meet Harel Shaked, Director of IT Services and Support at Outbrain.

WhatsApp Image 2024-08-05 at 09.24.431064×1600 94.5 KB

With an impressive track record of optimizing team workflows and enhancing productivity, Harel will share his expertise in empowering individuals and teams to reach new heights in his opening session.

Oh, and that’s not all; you will also be able to walk around and explore our multi-media virtual booths, of course, with your llama avatar.

Register here: WorkForms
